Data preprocessing

Jorge Alonso

2026-05-19

1. Preparing

1.1. Loading packages and data

# Loading packages
library(tidyverse)
library(skimr)
library(stringi)
# Cleaning memory
rm(list=ls(all=TRUE))
gc()
##           used (Mb) gc trigger (Mb) max used  (Mb)
## Ncells 1250745 66.8    2526014  135  2398611 128.1
## Vcells 2157927 16.5    8388608   64  3685765  28.2
# Database link
raw_url <- "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jmalonso55/Applied-Statistics-for-a-Tropical-Arboretum/refs/heads/main/data/raw_data.csv"
# Loading data
data <- read.csv(raw_url, sep = ",")

# Checking
summary(data)
##     seção             canteiro             tombo         taxon          
##  Length:10106       Length:10106       Min.   :   1   Length:10106

##                                        3rd Qu.:6617                     
##                                        Max.   :9180                     
##                                                                         
##     habito              altura           cap             dap

##  Class :character   1st Qu.: 7.71   1st Qu.: 45.0   1st Qu.: 14.32

# Checking the data structure
glimpse(data)

1.2. Themes and functions

# Theme for plots
tema <- theme(
        panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "grey90", linetype = "dashed"),
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = "grey97"))
# Function for checking growth habit
check_hab <- function(data, ref) {
  data %>%
    filter(name %in% ref) %>%
    count(habito_pad)}
# Function for growth habit recoding
recode_hab <- function(data, ref, n_habit) {
  data %>%
    mutate(habito_pad = if_else(name %in% ref, n_habit, habito_pad))}
# Function for checking extremes
check_extreme <- function(data, variable, n = 20) {
  
  columns <- c("tombo", "name", "family", "altura", "dap")
  
  high <- data %>%
    arrange(desc({{ variable }})) %>%
    slice_head(n = n) %>%
    mutate(extreme = "Higher")
  
  low <- data %>%
    arrange({{ variable }}) %>%
    slice_head(n = n) %>%
    mutate(extreme = "Lower")
  
  bind_rows(high, low) %>%
    select(extreme, any_of(columns))}

2. Preprocessing the data

# Recoding arboretum beds (canteiros)

# Type conversion
data$seção <- as.numeric(data$seção)

# Adding new variable
data$sec_cant <- paste0(round(data$seção, 0), data$canteiro)
# Splitting taxonomic information
data <- data %>%
  mutate(taxon = as.character(taxon),
    taxon = str_squish(taxon),
    family = str_extract(taxon, "^\\s*[A-Z-]+") |> str_trim(),
    resto = str_remove(taxon, "^\\s*[A-Z-]+\\s*"),
    genus = if_else(resto == "", NA_character_, word(resto, 1)),
    species = if_else(str_detect(word(resto, 2), "^[a-z][a-z-]*$"), word(resto, 2), NA_character_),
    autor = case_when(is.na(genus) ~ NA_character_, is.na(species) ~ str_remove(resto, paste0("^", genus, "\\s*")), TRUE ~ str_remove(resto, paste0("^", genus, "\\s+", species, "\\s*"))),
    autor = na_if(autor, "")) %>%
  mutate(name = paste(genus, species)) %>% 
  select(-resto)
# Checking habito
unique(data$habito)
##  [1] "árvore"                            "palmeira"                         
##  [3] "arvoreta"                          "arbusto"                          
##  [5] "arbusto, arvore"                   "erva"                             
##  [7] ""                                  "herbácea"                         
##  [9] "arbusto, árvore"                   "árvore "                          
## [11] "plameira"                          "palmera"                          
## [13] "parvore"                           "Árvore"                           
## [15] "cespitosa"                         "palmeita"                         
## [17] "arbusto, trepadeira"               "arbóreo"                          
## [19] "trepadeira"                        "arbusto/trepadeira"               
## [21] "bambu"                             "herbácea, trepadeira"             
## [23] "aquática"                          "pteridófita"                      
## [25] "erva rizomatosa"                   "trepadeira com espinho"           
## [27] "moita"                             "arbusto volúvel"                  
## [29] "arbustivo"                         "subarbusto"                       
## [31] "escandente"                        "cipó"                             
## [33] "Herbácea, terrestre, semi-ciófila" "Herbácea, terrestre, heliófila"   
## [35] "Arborea, Heliófila"                "Arbustiva, Terrestre, Ciófila"    
## [37] "Arbusto"                           "epífita"                          
## [39] "arbusto ou árvore"                 "Arbusto escandente"
# Cleaning habito
data <- data %>%
  mutate(habito_original = habito,
    habito_limpo = habito %>%
      str_squish() %>%
      str_to_lower() %>%
      stri_trans_general("Latin-ASCII"),
    habito_pad = case_when(
      habito_limpo == "" ~ NA_character_,
      
      habito_limpo %in% c("arvore", "arboreo", "arborea, heliofila", "parvore") ~ "Tree",
      
      habito_limpo %in% c("palmeira", "plameira", "palmera", "palmeita") ~ "Arborescent",
      
      habito_limpo %in% c("subarbusto", "arbusto", "arbustivo", "arbustiva, terrestre, ciofila") ~ "Shrub",
      
      habito_limpo %in% c("erva", "herbacea", "erva rizomatosa", "herbacea, terrestre, semi-ciofila", "herbacea, terrestre, heliofila") ~ "Herb",
      
      habito_limpo %in% c("trepadeira", "trepadeira com espinho", "cipo", "escandente", "arbusto voluvel", "arbusto escandente", "arbusto, trepadeira", "arbusto/trepadeira", "herbacea, trepadeira") ~ "Climber",
      
      habito_limpo %in% c("arbusto, arvore", "arbusto ou arvore", "arvoreta") ~ "Shrub/tree",
      
      habito_limpo %in% c("bambu") ~ "Bamboo",
      
      habito_limpo %in% c("cespitosa", "moita") ~ "Clumping",
      
      habito_limpo %in% c("aquatica") ~ "Aquatic",
      
      habito_limpo %in% c("pteridofita") ~ "Pteridophyte",
      
      habito_limpo %in% c("epifita") ~ "Epiphyte",
      
      TRUE ~ "Check"))
# Checking changes
unique(data$habito_pad)
##  [1] "Tree"         "Arborescent"  "Shrub/tree"   "Shrub"        "Herb"        
##  [6] NA             "Clumping"     "Climber"      "Bamboo"       "Aquatic"     
## [11] "Pteridophyte" "Epiphyte"
# Checking CBH and DBH consistency
data %>%
  mutate(dap_calc = cap / pi, dif_dap = dap - dap_calc) %>%
  summarise(min_dif = min(dif_dap, na.rm = TRUE), max_dif = max(dif_dap, na.rm = TRUE), mean_abs_dif = mean(abs(dif_dap), na.rm = TRUE))
##        min_dif     max_dif mean_abs_dif
## 1 -0.005221003 0.004928699  0.002518092

2.1. Processing multi-stem plants

2.1.1. Single stem

# Filtering trees with a single stem
data_fuste_un <- data %>%
  select(sec_cant, tombo, family, genus, species, name, habito_pad, altura, dap, densidade) %>%
  filter(!is.na(altura)) %>% 
  group_by(tombo) %>%
    filter(n() == 1) %>%
    ungroup()
# Adding stem count and multi-stem variables
data_fuste_un$n_caule <- 1
data_fuste_un$multicaule <- 0

2.1.2. Processing multi-stem

# Filtering multi-stem plant
data_bifurcada <- data %>%
  select(sec_cant, tombo, family, genus, species, name, habito_pad, altura, dap, densidade) %>%
  filter(!is.na(altura)) %>% 
  group_by(tombo) %>%
    filter(n() != 1) %>%
    ungroup()
# Counting stems
n_fuste_bif <- data_bifurcada %>%
  count(tombo)
# Calculating equivalent DBH
data_bifurcada_eq <- data_bifurcada %>%
  group_by(tombo) %>%
  mutate(dap = sqrt(sum(dap^2))) %>%
  filter(altura == max(altura)) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  ungroup()
# Adding stem count and multi-stem variables
data_bifurcada_eq$n_caule <- n_fuste_bif$n
data_bifurcada_eq$multicaule <- 1

2.1.3. Merging the data

# Merging
data_trab <- bind_rows(data_fuste_un, data_bifurcada_eq) %>% 
  arrange(tombo)
# Creating logical variable for multi-stem
data_trab <- data_trab %>% 
   mutate(multicaule_l = factor(multicaule, levels = c(0, 1), labels = c("No", "Yes")))

2.1.4. New variables

# Calculating slenderness
data_trab <- data_trab %>% 
  mutate(rel_hd = altura/dap)
# Adding basal area
data_trab <- data_trab %>%
  mutate(area_basal = (pi * (dap / 2)^2) / 10000)
# Checking work data
skim(data_trab)

2.2. Checking for inconsistencies

2.2.1. Growth habit inconsistencies

# Checking palm habits
data_trab %>% 
  filter(family == "ARECACEAE") %>% 
  count(habito_pad)
## # A tibble: 4 × 2
##   habito_pad      n
##   <chr>       <int>
## 1 Arborescent  1353
## 2 Herb            2
## 3 Tree            6
## 4 <NA>            1
# Identifying palms with DBH > 10 cm as arborescent
data_trab <- data_trab %>%
  mutate(habito_pad = if_else(str_to_upper(family) == "ARECACEAE", "Arborescent", habito_pad))
# Checking unique families
sort(unique(data_trab$family))
##  [1] "ACANTHACEAE"      "ACHARIACEAE"      "ANACARDIACEAE"    "ANNONACEAE"      
##  [5] "APOCYNACEAE"      "AQUIFOLIACEAE"    "ARALIACEAE"       "ARAUCARIACEAE"   
##  [9] "ARECACEAE"        "ASPARAGACEAE"     "ASTERACEAE"       "BIGNONIACEAE"    
## [13] "BIXACEAE"         "BORAGINACEAE"     "BURSERACEAE"      "CACTACEAE"       
## [17] "CALOPHYLLACEAE"   "CANELLACEAE"      "CAPPARACEAE"      "CARICACEAE"      
## [21] "CARYOCARACEAE"    "CELASTRACEAE"     "CHRYSOBALANACEAE" "CLUSIACEAE"      
## [25] "COMBRETACEAE"     "CONVOLVULACEAE"   "CUPRESSACEAE"     "CYCADACEAE"      
## [29] "DILLENIACEAE"     "EBENACEAE"        "ELAEOCARPACEAE"   "ERYTHROXYLACEAE" 
## [33] "EUPHORBIACEAE"    "FAGACEAE"         "HELICONIACEAE"    "HERNANDIACEAE"   
## [37] "HIPPOCRATEACEAE"  "INDETERMINADA"    "JUGLANDACEAE"     "LAMIACEAE"       
## [41] "LAURACEAE"        "LECYTHIDACEAE"    "LEGUMINOSAE"      "LYTHRACEAE"      
## [45] "MAGNOLIACEAE"     "MALPIGHIACEAE"    "MALVACEAE"        "MELASTOMATACEAE" 
## [49] "MELIACEAE"        "MORACEAE"         "MYRISTICACEAE"    "MYRTACEAE"       
## [53] "NYCTAGINACEAE"    "OCHNACEAE"        "OLEACEAE"         "OXALIDACEAE"     
## [57] "PANDANACEAE"      "PHYLLANTHACEAE"   "PHYTOLACCACEAE"   "PINACEAE"        
## [61] "PIPERACEAE"       "PODOCARPACEAE"    "POLYGONACEAE"     "PRIMULACEAE"     
## [65] "PROTEACEAE"       "PUTRANJIVACEAE"   "QUIINACEAE"       "RHAMNACEAE"      
## [69] "ROSACEAE"         "RUBIACEAE"        "RUTACEAE"         "SALICACEAE"      
## [73] "SANTALACEAE"      "SAPINDACEAE"      "SAPOTACEAE"       "SIMAROUBACEAE"   
## [77] "SOLANACEAE"       "STRELITZIACEAE"   "TRIGONIACEAE"     "URTICACEAE"      
## [81] "VERBENACEAE"      "VOCHYSIACEAE"     "ZAMIACEAE"
# Checking growth habits of some families
data_trab %>% 
  filter(family %in% c("ASPARAGACEAE", "CACTACEAE", "CYCADACEAE", "HELICONIACEAE", "PANDANACEAE", "STRELITZIACEAE", "ZAMIACEAE")) %>%
  count(genus, habito_pad)
## # A tibble: 22 × 3
##    genus      habito_pad     n
##    <chr>      <chr>      <int>
##  1 Asparagus  Tree           1
##  2 Beaucarnea Tree           4
##  3 Beaucarnea <NA>           1
##  4 Cordyline  Tree           2
##  5 Cycas      Clumping       4
##  6 Cycas      Shrub          7
##  7 Cycas      Tree           2
##  8 Cycas      <NA>           1
##  9 Dioon      Clumping       1
## 10 Dracaena   Tree           7
## # ℹ 12 more rows
# Reclassifying individuals identified as trees as arborescent
data_trab <- data_trab %>%
  mutate(habito_pad = if_else(family %in% c("ASPARAGACEAE", "CACTACEAE", "CYCADACEAE", "HELICONIACEAE",  "PANDANACEAE", "STRELITZIACEAE", "ZAMIACEAE") & habito_pad == "Tree", "Arborescent", habito_pad))
# Checking errors identified by BIEN or GIFT
arvores <- c("Acanthosyris paulo-alvinii", "Albizia polycephala", "Alchornea NA", "Andira nitida", "Astronium urundeuva", "Calycophyllum candidissimum", "Calycophyllum spruceanum", "Cecropia NA", "Chloroleucon foliolosum", "Coccoloba uvifera", "Cyclolobium brasiliense", "Eugenia sprengelii", "Eugenia macrosperma", "Exostyles venusta", "Ficus NA", "Guarea NA", "Luetzelburgia guaissara", "Mimosa schomburgkii", "Myracrodruon urundeuva", "Myrcia carioca", "Myrsine coriacea", "Pleroma granulosum", "Rauvolfia sumatrana", "Simira alba", "Talipariti tiliaceum", "Trichilia hirta", "Trichilia ramalhoi")
arvore_arbusto <- c("Alchornea trewioides", "Averrhoa bilimbi", "Bauhinia aculeata", "Cordia superba", "Dalbergia hortensis", "Erythrina speciosa", "Eugenia involucrata", "Eugenia NA", "Platycladus orientalis", "Spongiosperma grandiflorum", "Tabernaemontana catharinensis", "Theobroma cacao", "Thuja occidentalis")
arbusto <- c("Acalypha NA", "Acnistus arborescens", "Azanza lampas", "Bauhinia ungulata", "Byrsonima crassifolia", "Callicarpa nudiflora", "Casearia sylvestris", "Cestrum axillare", "Coccoloba arborescens", "Coffea liberica", "Dombeya wallichii", "Gmelina asiatica", "Hibiscus NA", "Ilex cornuta", "Jatropha curcas", "Murraya paniculata", "Myrciaria tenella", "Parkinsonia aculeata", "Piper NA", "Piper tuberculatum", "Quercus lusitanica", "Rhaphiolepis bibas", "Stifftia chrysantha", "Tecomaria capensis", "Thespesia lampas")
arbusto_liana <- c("Antigonon leptopus", "Grevillea thelemanniana", "Macropsychanthus hexander", "Poikilospermum naucleiflorum", "Solandra grandiflora", "Strophanthus gratus", "Trigonia villosa", "Turbina corymbosa")
arborescente <- c("Beaucarnea NA", "Cycas NA", "Encephalartos altensteinii", "Lepidozamia peroffskyana", "Pandanus NA", "Pandanus tectorius", "Pandanus utilis", "Ravenala madagascariensis", "Yucca aloifolia")
# Checking habits of trees
check_hab(data_trab, arvores)
## # A tibble: 5 × 2
##   habito_pad     n
##   <chr>      <int>
## 1 Climber        1
## 2 Shrub         11
## 3 Shrub/tree    19
## 4 Tree         122
## 5 <NA>           4
# Recoding trees
data_trab <- recode_hab(data_trab, arvores, "Tree")
# Checking habits of shrubs
check_hab(data_trab, arbusto)
## # A tibble: 4 × 2
##   habito_pad     n
##   <chr>      <int>
## 1 Climber        1
## 2 Shrub/tree     1
## 3 Tree          31
## 4 <NA>           3
# Recoding shrubs
data_trab <- recode_hab(data_trab, arbusto, "Shrub")
# Checking habits of shurb/tree
check_hab(data_trab, arvore_arbusto)
## # A tibble: 4 × 2
##   habito_pad     n
##   <chr>      <int>
## 1 Shrub         20
## 2 Shrub/tree     5
## 3 Tree          38
## 4 <NA>           3
# Recoding shrub/tree
data_trab <- recode_hab(data_trab, arvore_arbusto, "Shrub/tree")
# Checking habits of shrub/climber
check_hab(data_trab, arbusto_liana)
## # A tibble: 1 × 2
##   habito_pad     n
##   <chr>      <int>
## 1 Tree           8
# Recoding shrub/climber
data_trab <- recode_hab(data_trab, arbusto_liana, "Shrub/climber")
# Checking habits of arborescent
check_hab(data_trab, arborescente)
## # A tibble: 3 × 2
##   habito_pad      n
##   <chr>       <int>
## 1 Arborescent    28
## 2 Herb            3
## 3 <NA>           17
# Recoding arborecent
data_trab <- recode_hab(data_trab, arborescente, "Arborescent")
# Checking NA
data_trab %>% 
  filter(is.na(habito_pad))
## # A tibble: 3 × 15
##   sec_cant tombo family    genus species name  habito_pad altura   dap densidade
##   <chr>    <int> <chr>     <chr> <chr>   <chr> <chr>       <dbl> <dbl>     <dbl>
## 1 3C         650 PANDANAC… <NA>  <NA>    NA NA <NA>         2.4   22.8      0.33
## 2 22E       4726 CUPRESSA… <NA>  <NA>    NA NA <NA>        13.4   24.3      0.41
## 3 36B       8133 MYRTACEAE <NA>  <NA>    NA NA <NA>         7.79  17.5      0.76
## # ℹ 5 more variables: n_caule <dbl>, multicaule <dbl>, multicaule_l <fct>,
## #   rel_hd <dbl>, area_basal <dbl>
# Recoding NA
data_trab <- data_trab %>%
  mutate(habito_pad = case_when(tombo == 650 ~ "Arborescent", tombo %in% c(4726, 8133) ~ "Tree", TRUE ~ habito_pad))
# Growth habit final check
unique(data_trab$habito_pad)
## [1] "Tree"          "Arborescent"   "Shrub"         "Shrub/tree"   
## [5] "Herb"          "Shrub/climber" "Clumping"

2.2.2. Height and DBH inconsistencies

# Checking height extremes
check_extreme(data, altura)
##    extreme tombo                       name         family altura    dap
## 1   Higher  5311         Khaya senegalensis      MELIACEAE  44.35 150.56
## 2   Higher  2406         Roystonea oleracea      ARECACEAE  42.31  79.26
## 3   Higher  2408         Roystonea oleracea      ARECACEAE  42.12  78.94
## 4   Higher  2219         Roystonea oleracea      ARECACEAE  40.42  82.19
## 5   Higher  2420         Roystonea oleracea      ARECACEAE  40.36  77.35

## 9   Higher  2236         Roystonea oleracea      ARECACEAE  40.00  80.21
## 10  Higher  2405         Roystonea oleracea      ARECACEAE  40.00  76.71
## 11  Higher  1917            Ceiba pentandra      MALVACEAE  39.63 219.00

## 13  Higher  1231         Roystonea oleracea      ARECACEAE  39.06  78.30

## 15  Higher  5090         Roystonea oleracea      ARECACEAE  38.97  71.62
## 16  Higher  6185         Khaya senegalensis      MELIACEAE  38.35 155.97
## 17  Higher  1229         Roystonea oleracea      ARECACEAE  38.00  77.99
## 18  Higher  4052         Roystonea oleracea      ARECACEAE  37.97  70.82
## 19  Higher   879         Roystonea oleracea      ARECACEAE  37.78  77.22
## 20  Higher  5142         Roystonea oleracea      ARECACEAE  37.29  64.87
## 21   Lower   635          Phoenix reclinata      ARECACEAE   1.30  16.87
## 22   Lower  3689  Ravenala madagascariensis STRELITZIACEAE   1.30  21.14
## 23   Lower  6356                Pandanus NA    PANDANACEAE   1.30  23.71
## 24   Lower  3719  Ravenala madagascariensis STRELITZIACEAE   1.35  24.51
## 25   Lower  7883         Roystonea oleracea      ARECACEAE   1.37  10.60
## 26   Lower  3438  Ravenala madagascariensis STRELITZIACEAE   1.40  23.68
## 27   Lower  3691  Ravenala madagascariensis STRELITZIACEAE   1.40  23.17
## 28   Lower  3729  Ravenala madagascariensis STRELITZIACEAE   1.40  23.17
## 29   Lower  4405     Phytelephas macrocarpa      ARECACEAE   1.40  34.00
## 30   Lower  4795  Ravenala madagascariensis STRELITZIACEAE   1.40  24.19
## 31   Lower  4795  Ravenala madagascariensis STRELITZIACEAE   1.40  20.21
## 32   Lower  3737  Ravenala madagascariensis STRELITZIACEAE   1.42  24.86
## 33   Lower  2867 Astrocaryum aculeatissimum      ARECACEAE   1.45  10.79
## 34   Lower  3719  Ravenala madagascariensis STRELITZIACEAE   1.45  20.75
## 35   Lower  7751        Phoenix dactylifera      ARECACEAE   1.46  64.62
## 36   Lower  4664                   Cycas NA     CYCADACEAE   1.48  18.14
## 37   Lower  5100        Manicaria saccifera      ARECACEAE   1.50  22.60
## 38   Lower  9084        Livistona chinensis      ARECACEAE   1.50  24.83
## 39   Lower  1367             Cycas revoluta     CYCADACEAE   1.53  15.22
## 40   Lower  3691  Ravenala madagascariensis STRELITZIACEAE   1.60  21.61
# Checking DBH extremes
check_extreme(data, dap)
##    extreme tombo                     name        family altura    dap
## 1   Higher  6847            Samanea saman   LEGUMINOSAE  27.73 224.54
## 2   Higher  1917          Ceiba pentandra     MALVACEAE  39.63 219.00
## 3   Higher  4027        Sterculia apetala     MALVACEAE  30.51 194.81
## 4   Higher  7201          Spondias mombin ANACARDIACEAE  20.38 192.58
## 5   Higher  5030             Ficus virens      MORACEAE  25.28 177.11
## 6   Higher  6689            Samanea saman   LEGUMINOSAE  19.35 176.66
## 7   Higher  8161           Pachira glabra     MALVACEAE   6.25 174.75
## 8   Higher  6249          Ficus benjamina      MORACEAE  18.00 171.12
## 9   Higher  5042             Ficus virens      MORACEAE  22.58 168.70
## 10  Higher  1431 Artocarpus heterophyllus      MORACEAE  10.45 168.07
## 11  Higher  4135          Ceiba pentandra     MALVACEAE  35.57 167.24
## 12  Higher  5241                    NA NA INDETERMINADA  10.70 166.79
## 13  Higher  6688            Samanea saman   LEGUMINOSAE  20.12 165.84
## 14  Higher  3973         Mangifera indica ANACARDIACEAE  14.22 165.78
## 15  Higher  2700         Mangifera indica ANACARDIACEAE  21.79 165.20
## 16  Higher   717          Ceiba pentandra     MALVACEAE  30.00 164.88
## 17  Higher  6714        Ficus clusiifolia      MORACEAE  20.73 163.61
## 18  Higher  6997         Mangifera indica ANACARDIACEAE  17.42 163.17
## 19  Higher  8935   Cavanillesia umbellata     MALVACEAE  26.95 162.66
## 20  Higher  6256            Samanea saman   LEGUMINOSAE  26.98 162.59
## 21   Lower    64         Euterpe oleracea     ARECACEAE  10.00  10.19
## 22   Lower   475          Aiphanes minima     ARECACEAE   4.06  10.19
## 23   Lower   660       Pandanus houlletii   PANDANACEAE   3.29  10.19
## 24   Lower   705         Euterpe oleracea     ARECACEAE  14.00  10.19
## 25   Lower   771  Oncosperma fasciculatum     ARECACEAE   5.66  10.19
## 26   Lower   771  Oncosperma fasciculatum     ARECACEAE   5.33  10.19
## 27   Lower  1418         Euterpe oleracea     ARECACEAE  11.88  10.19
## 28   Lower  1922         Metrodorea nigra      RUTACEAE   3.80  10.19
## 29   Lower  2207         Euterpe oleracea     ARECACEAE  14.70  10.19
## 30   Lower  2336         Euterpe oleracea     ARECACEAE  12.05  10.19
## 31   Lower  2720  Aspidosperma pyrifolium   APOCYNACEAE  14.32  10.19
## 32   Lower  2824     Pereskia grandifolia     CACTACEAE   6.99  10.19
## 33   Lower  3723            Myrcia selloi     MYRTACEAE   5.61  10.19
## 34   Lower  3771 Triplochiton zambesiacus     MALVACEAE   8.91  10.19
## 35   Lower  3993         Euterpe oleracea     ARECACEAE   8.03  10.19
## 36   Lower  3997         Euterpe oleracea     ARECACEAE   5.93  10.19
## 37   Lower  3999         Euterpe oleracea     ARECACEAE  11.03  10.19
## 38   Lower  3999         Euterpe oleracea     ARECACEAE  11.03  10.19
## 39   Lower  4012 Brownea longipedicellata   LEGUMINOSAE   7.71  10.19
## 40   Lower  4178         Euterpe oleracea     ARECACEAE  10.90  10.19
# Checking highest slenderness
data_trab %>% 
  arrange(desc(rel_hd)) %>% 
  slice_head(n = 20) %>% 
  select(tombo, name, family, altura, dap)
## # A tibble: 20 × 5
##    tombo name                     family        altura   dap
##    <int> <chr>                    <chr>          <dbl> <dbl>
##  1  7748 NA NA                    INDETERMINADA   31.4  15.0
##  2  4525 Cespedesia spathulata    OCHNACEAE       19.6  12.0
##  3  4950 Garcinia gummi-gutta     CLUSIACEAE      20.8  12.9
##  4  2782 Ptychosperma elegans     ARECACEAE       16.2  11.2
##  5  2720 Aspidosperma pyrifolium  APOCYNACEAE     14.3  10.2
##  6  2783 Ptychosperma elegans     ARECACEAE       15.6  11.2
##  7  4185 Euterpe oleracea         ARECACEAE       15.2  11.1
##  8   870 Areca catechu            ARECACEAE       15.6  11.7
##  9  5004 Calycophyllum spruceanum RUBIACEAE       13.9  10.8
## 10   776 Ptychosperma elegans     ARECACEAE       13.9  10.9
## 11  4138 Calycophyllum spruceanum RUBIACEAE       16.8  13.5
## 12  5251 Calycophyllum spruceanum RUBIACEAE       30.3  25.6
## 13  2771 Livistona chinensis      ARECACEAE       25.5  21.6
## 14  2707 Aspidosperma polyneuron  APOCYNACEAE     16.9  14.5
## 15  5203 Zygia inaequalis         LEGUMINOSAE     13.2  11.3
## 16  2613 Myroxylon peruiferum     LEGUMINOSAE     17.0  15.1
## 17  3385 Syagrus oleracea         ARECACEAE       14.9  13.4
## 18  4282 NA NA                    LECYTHIDACEAE   14    12.6
## 19  7775 NA NA                    ARECACEAE       11.8  10.7
## 20  8742 NA NA                    INDETERMINADA   16.9  15.3
# Checking lowest slenderness
data_trab %>% 
  arrange(rel_hd) %>% 
  slice_head(n = 20) %>% 
  select(tombo, name, family, altura, dap)
## # A tibble: 20 × 5
##    tombo name                      family         altura   dap
##    <int> <chr>                     <chr>           <dbl> <dbl>
##  1  7752 Phoenix dactylifera       ARECACEAE        1.61  73.2
##  2  7751 Phoenix dactylifera       ARECACEAE        1.46  64.6
##  3  8319 Attalea phalerata         ARECACEAE        2.2   92.6
##  4  6484 Attalea phalerata         ARECACEAE        2.84  89.8
##  5   757 Attalea phalerata         ARECACEAE        2.62  78.9
##  6  5571 Guarea guidonia           MELIACEAE        2.73  81.5
##  7  8161 Pachira glabra            MALVACEAE        6.25 175. 
##  8  3633 Attalea phalerata         ARECACEAE        3.35  84.7
##  9  1487 Attalea phalerata         ARECACEAE        2.62  66.2
## 10   533 Phoenix canariensis       ARECACEAE        1.99  49.8
## 11  6266 Livistona saribus         ARECACEAE        1.86  46.1
## 12  6485 Attalea phalerata         ARECACEAE        2.71  66.9
## 13  8991 Attalea phalerata         ARECACEAE        3.28  80.0
## 14  9176 Livistona NA              ARECACEAE        1.6   38.8
## 15  8384 Ravenala madagascariensis STRELITZIACEAE   2.33  56.5
## 16  7788 Astrocaryum murumuru      ARECACEAE        1.69  38.8
## 17  3737 Ravenala madagascariensis STRELITZIACEAE   6.85 150. 
## 18  4405 Phytelephas macrocarpa    ARECACEAE        2.6   55.9
## 19   592 Phoenix pusilla           ARECACEAE        1.7   35.0
## 20  8544 Elaeis guineensis         ARECACEAE        1.8   37.0
# Filtering records with inconsistent values
data_trab <- data_trab %>% 
  filter(!tombo %in% c(5571, 8161))
# Checking whether "tombo" is unique
n_distinct(data_trab$tombo)
## [1] 4631
nrow(data_trab)
## [1] 4631
# Checking records with missing genus or species
data_trab %>%
  filter(is.na(genus) | is.na(species)) %>%
  count(family, genus, species, sort = TRUE)
## # A tibble: 127 × 4
##    family        genus     species     n
##    <chr>         <chr>     <chr>   <int>
##  1 INDETERMINADA <NA>      <NA>      158
##  2 LEGUMINOSAE   <NA>      <NA>       34
##  3 ARECACEAE     Livistona <NA>       21
##  4 ARECACEAE     <NA>      <NA>       21
##  5 BIGNONIACEAE  Tabebuia  <NA>       18
##  6 MYRTACEAE     <NA>      <NA>       14
##  7 MALVACEAE     <NA>      <NA>       13
##  8 MORACEAE      Ficus     <NA>       12
##  9 POLYGONACEAE  Triplaris <NA>       12
## 10 BIGNONIACEAE  <NA>      <NA>       10
## # ℹ 117 more rows
# Checking basal area consistency
data_trab %>%
  mutate(area_basal_calc = pi * (dap / 200)^2, dif_ab = area_basal - area_basal_calc) %>%
  summarise(min_dif = min(dif_ab, na.rm = TRUE), max_dif = max(dif_ab, na.rm = TRUE), mean_abs_dif = mean(abs(dif_ab), na.rm = TRUE))
## # A tibble: 1 × 3
##     min_dif  max_dif mean_abs_dif
##       <dbl>    <dbl>        <dbl>
## 1 -8.88e-16 4.44e-16     2.05e-17
# Checking unique bed records
unique(data_trab$sec_cant)
##   [1] "1A"                 "1B"                 "1C"                
##   [4] "1D"                 "1E"                 "2A"                
##   [7] "2B"                 "2C"                 "2D"

## [181] "33B"                "33C"                "34A"

## [199] "39D"                "40A"                "40B"               
## [202] "1F"                 "37D"                "36B"               
## [205] "26F"                "41A"                "5k"                
## [208] "41B"                "41C"                "41D"               
## [211] "NAJardim Sensorial" "NACactário"         "22F"               
## [214] "15E"
# Checking beds with 3 or less plants with DBH > 10
data_trab %>%
  count(sec_cant) %>%
  filter(n <= 3) %>%
  arrange(n)
## # A tibble: 18 × 2
##    sec_cant               n
##    <chr>              <int>
##  1 22F                    1
##  2 37D                    1
##  3 39C                    1
##  4 41C                    1
##  5 41D                    1
##  6 5H                     1
##  7 5k                     1
##  8 9H                     1
##  9 NAJardim Sensorial     1
## 10 14B                    2
## 11 18C                    2
## 12 31F                    2
## 13 31G                    2
## 14 38A                    2
## 15 28D                    3
## 16 2D                     3
## 17 5E                     3
## 18 5F                     3

2.3. Evaluating possible outliers

# Scatter plot
ggplot(data_trab, aes(x = dap, y = altura)) +
  geom_point() +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(10, 40, 70, 100, 130, 160, 190, 220)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(5, 15, 25, 35, 45)) +
  labs(x = "Diameter at breast height (cm)", y = "Tree total height (m)") + 
  tema +
  theme(panel.grid.major.x = element_line(color = "grey90", linetype = "dashed"))

# Slenderness histogram
ggplot(data_trab, aes(x = rel_hd)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "lightblue", color = "grey70") +
  labs(y = "Count", x = "Slenderness") +
  theme_classic() +
  tema

# Slenderness boxplot
ggplot(data_trab, aes(y = rel_hd, x = "")) +
  geom_jitter(color = "darkblue", alpha = 0.15, width = 0.15, height = 0.05, size = 0.5) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.25, fill = NA) +
  labs(y = "Slenderness", x = "") +
  theme_classic()

# qqplot
qqnorm(data_trab$rel_hd)
qqline(data_trab$rel_hd)

# 5% most extreme observations
limites <- quantile(data_trab$rel_hd, c(0.025, 0.975), na.rm = TRUE)

# Adding a variable to identify
data_trab <- data_trab %>% 
  mutate(extreme_rel_hd = rel_hd < limites[1] | rel_hd > limites[2])
# Scatter plot with margins
ggplot(data_trab, aes(x = dap, y = altura, color = extreme_rel_hd)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(25, 50, 75, 100, 125, 150, 175, 200, 225)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(5, 10, 15, 20, 25, 30, 35, 40, 45)) +
  labs(x = "Diameter at breast height (cm)", y = "Tree total height (m)", color = "Extreme obs.:") +
  tema +
  theme(panel.grid.major.x = element_line(color = "grey90", linetype = "dashed"))

# Removing extreme column
data_trab <- data_trab %>% 
  select(-extreme_rel_hd)

3. Saving work data

# Saving
write.csv(data_trab, "pre_processed_data.csv",  row.names = FALSE)
